what_to_do: Rest and drink lots of water or ORS
fever.see_doctor_if: Fever more than 3 days, temperature above 103°F, or in children under 3 months.

diarrhea.symptoms: Loose watery stools many times. Can cause dehydration fast.
what_to_do: ORS is most important. Mix 6 spoons sugar and half spoon salt in 1 litre water
diarrhea.see_doctor_if: Blood in stool, signs of dehydration, or lasting more than 3 days.

headache.see_doctor_if: Sudden very severe headache, headache with fever and stiff neck, or after head injury.

stomach pain.see_doctor_if: Severe pain, blood in vomit or stool, or pain with high fever.

what_to_do: Call 108 immediately if pain is crushing or spreading to arm or jaw
chest pain.see_doctor_if: ⚠️ ANY chest pain should be checked by doctor immediately.

what_to_do: Drink warm water with honey and ginger
cough.see_doctor_if: Cough more than 2 weeks, coughing blood, or high fever with cough.

burns.symptoms: Skin burned by heat, fire, or hot water.
what_to_do: Put under cool running water for 10-20 minutes immediately
Don't apply ice, butter, or toothpaste
burns.see_doctor_if: Burn bigger than your palm, on face/hands/feet, or blisters forming.

dengue.symptoms: Very high fever, severe body pain, skin rash.
what_to_do: Drink lots of water and ORS
Take paracetamol only. Don't take aspirin or ibuprofen
dengue.see_doctor_if: ⚠️ Severe stomach pain, vomiting, bleeding from anywhere — go to hospital immediately.

malaria.symptoms: Fever that comes and goes in cycles with shivering.

breathing difficulty.see_doctor_if: ⚠️ Always seek immediate help for breathing difficulty.
